Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Plaintiffs Complaint For Failure To Serve Defendants Within Three Years From Filing Complaint; **First Appearance Fees Paid**
Off Calendar Dec-12-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Colin H. Jewell; Cholakian & Associates, APC; 650-871-9544; appearing as counsel for defendants San Francisco Housing Authority and Barbara Smith.

Hearing held. Counsel states that SFHA offices were open to accept service of process throughout the COVID-19 Pandemic. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AND BARBARA SMITH'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DISMISS PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANTS WITHIN THREE YEARS FROM FILING COMPLAINT is granted.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff?S Complaint For Failure To Serve Defendants Within Three Years From Filing Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-28-2023 Continued To Dec-12-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY and BARBARA SMITH's Motion To Dismiss Plaintiffs Complaint For Failure To Serve Defendants Within Three Years From Filing Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is transferred to be heard in department 501 on December 12, 2023, at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all cases arising from real property per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
